questions.question: What does Paul say God will repay to those who trouble the Thessalonians?
questions.feedback: God considers it just to repay with affliction those who afflict the believers.

questions.question: Paul says the Lord Jesus will be revealed from heaven with what?
options: His mighty angels in flaming fire
questions.correct: His mighty angels in flaming fire
questions.feedback: The Lord Jesus will be revealed from heaven with his mighty angels in flaming fire.

questions.question: Paul says the Thessalonians' faith is growing abundantly.
questions.feedback: Paul gives thanks because their faith is growing abundantly.

questions.question: Paul boasts about the Thessalonians' steadfastness and _____ in their persecutions.
questions.feedback: Paul boasts of their steadfastness and faith during persecutions.

questions.question: Those who do not obey the gospel will suffer the punishment of eternal _____ from the presence of the Lord.
questions.feedback: They will suffer eternal destruction, away from the Lord's presence.
